sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, name String, date_of_birth DateTime, similarity_score Float64);
SELECT EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date_of_birth) AS year, jaroSimilarity('clickhouse', name) AS similarity FROM test_data WHERE jaroSimilarity('clickhouse', name) > 0.5;
SELECT jaroSimilarity(EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_of_birth), CAST(name AS String)) AS similarity_score FROM test_data WHERE name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, jaroSimilarity(name, 'clickhouse') AS similarity_score FROM test_data WHERE EXTRACT(DAY FROM date_of_birth) = 1 HAVING similarity_score > 0.0;
SELECT name, jaroSimilarity('clickhouse', name) AS similarity_score FROM (SELECT DISTINCT name FROM test_data WHERE date_of_birth IS NOT NULL) AS unique_names WHERE similarity_score > 0.4;
SELECT jaroSimilarity(name, (SELECT name FROM test_data WHERE id = 1)) AS similarity FROM test_data WHERE similarity IS NOT NULL ORDER BY similarity DESC;
WITH (SELECT AVG(jaroSimilarity(name, 'click')) FROM test_data) AS avg_similarity SELECT id, name, jaroSimilarity(name, 'clickhouse') AS similarity FROM test_data HAVING similarity > avg_similarity;

SELECT id, jaroSimilarity(name, 'clikhosue') AS similarity_score, EXTRACT(MONTH FROM date_of_birth) AS birth_month FROM test_data WHERE similarity_score IS NOT NULL ORDER BY birth_month, similarity_score DESC;
ALTER TABLE test_data ADD COLUMN age UInt32;
UPDATE test_data SET age = 2023 - EXTRACT(YEAR FROM date_of_birth);
SELECT AVG(age) AS avg_age FROM test_data WHERE age IS NOT NULL HAVING avg_age > 10;
